arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta risking nightmare Champions League scenario with bold strategy vs Bournemouth
arts.sum: Arsenal have their minds on their upcoming Champions League semi-final second-leg with PSG but Mikel Arteta needs to make sure the Gunners book their spot in the competition for next season first

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all 10 weekend games
arts.sum: Warren Ashurst has provided a score prediction for every match in the Premier League this weekend as the race for the European places hots up.
